title: rosa canina var. cariotii
intro: Rosa canina var. cariotii, also known as the dwarf dog rose, is a variety of rose plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its hips, which are a rich source of vitamin C, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The hips and leaves of Rosa canina var. cariotii have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including diarrhea, inflammation, and infections, due to their antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can also provide health benefits such as boosting the immune system and reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of Rosa canina var. cariotii, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be made from the hips and leaves of the plant, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
